title: Ghost Shield
description: Lowers shield and hides it in off-hand when not in use.
body:
# Ghost Shield
Ghost Shield is a **lightweight** resource pack compatible with all Minecraft versions since the shield's release. It adds the two following features.

**Hidden Shield:**  
The shield is not visible when it's held in the offhand and not in use. It'll show again when blocking.

**Lower Shield:**  
Ghost Shield lowers the shield in first-person for better visibility.

**Credits:**  
Vanilla Tweaks (for the lower shield): https://vanillatweaks.net/  
Passive Shield (for the idea):  
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/passive-shield  
https://modrinth.com/mod/passive-shield
